question: The chart shows the defect rate in production from 2012 to 2022 (out of a possible 0–10%). What is the most appropriate description of the changes over this period?

options.A: There was a sharp increase in the defect rate
options.B: The defect rate remained perfectly constant
options.C: The defect rate showed large year-to-year swings
options.D: The defect rate changed only slightly over time

explanation: The y-axis uses a very tight range (5.22–5.59%) instead of a more informative 0–10% context, which visually exaggerates variability. The actual net change is about 0.01% over the period, which is modest in the full context.
